name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability

labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []

## Problem

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the change you'd like. Be concrete: which files, which APIs, which behavior. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you weigh? Why is the proposed one preferred? -->

## Trade-offs

<!-- What does this make harder, more complex, or slower? Is the trade worth it? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to docs, prior art, related issues, mock-ups. -->
